title: ItsJustMC+ Texturepack
description: New and Improved Vanilla Minecraft Textures!
body:
## Welcome to the ItsJustMC+ Texturepack
This Project is a Combination of Multiple other reasourcepacks all put into one in order to create the Best Vanilla Minecraft Texturepack! The Vanilla Textures are outdated and most aren't very appealing, ItsJustMC+ aims to completely Revamp every Texture while maintaining True to the default textures.

### NOT ALL TEXTURE ARE MADE BY ME

**Textures Used**
- Stay True
- Vanilla Tweaks
- Brush Up
- Detailed Brush
- Vanilla Evolved
- Artisan Default
- Fresh Textures
- Spud's Better Textures
- Stellar

Fresh Animation Supported (check profile)

Join My Discord to stay updated and check out my profile for more content
